info.description: HubSpot portal and form IDs used by contact and newsletter sections on the site.

label.description: Friendly name so you can tell forms apart, e.g. 'Contact page inquiry form'.

identifier.description: Internal code used by the website to find this form. Generated from the Label — do not change unless a developer asks you to.

portalId.description: HubSpot Portal ID (from your HubSpot account). Ask HubSpot admin if unsure.

formId.description: HubSpot Form ID for this specific form.

theme.description: Colour style of the embedded form: light or dark.
